nasb.text: But they said, “We cannot, until all the flocks are gathered, and they roll the stone from the mouth of the well; then we water the sheep.”

esv.text: But they said, “We cannot until all the flocks are gathered together and the stone is rolled from the mouth of the well; then we water the sheep.”

cnv.text: 他們回答：“我們不能這樣作，必須等到所有的羊群都到齊了，有人把井口的石頭輥開，我們才可以取水給羊群喝。”

ccb.text: 他们说：“不行，要等所有的羊群到齐，有人挪开井口的石头后，才能饮羊。”

csbs.text: 他们说：“我们不能这么做！要到所有的羊群都聚拢，石头从井口挪开后，我们才能给羊群饮水。”
